title: cicer spiroceras
intro: Cicer spiroceras, also known as black gram or urad bean, is a type of legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Cicer spiroceras include its potential to help manage conditions such as diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and certain types of cancer. Cicer spiroceras is often prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
